escalation.rationale: US enforces 'ironclad blockade' on Iran with 34+ ships intercepted while Trump cancels peace talks and orders Navy to shoot Iranian mine-laying boats.

ticker_items: Trump cancels Iran peace talks, orders US Navy to shoot Iranian boats
US 'ironclad blockade' intercepts 34+ Iranian vessels globally
Israel strikes Lebanon's Khiam amid ceasefire extension
Russia fires 619 drones at Ukraine, 10 killed
Trump safe after White House shooting incident

eastern_europe.description: Russian forces fired 619 drones and 47 missiles killing 10 people and injuring dozens.

middle_east.description: Fresh Israeli attacks hit Khiam and Yohmor al-Shaqif despite ceasefire extension.
Iranian jet breached US defenses and struck Gulf base in early phase of war.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll

russia.text: The EU has gone mad – it must be stopped
russia.speaker: Sergey Karaganov
russia.title: Russian policy analyst

middle_east.text: shoot any Iranian boats laying mines
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Macron suggests Europe needs stronger defense posture, claiming China, Russia, and US are all opposed to European interests. France leading efforts with UK to establish multinational mission to safeguard Strait of Hormuz shipping.
RAF deploys Typhoon jets over Romania following Russian drone attacks on Ukraine. UK working with France on multinational Strait of Hormuz security mission.
Hundreds of Spanish protesters demand end to Iran war and expulsion of NATO bases from Spain in Madrid demonstrations.

financial.notes: Iran war has drained US supplies of critical weapons forcing Pentagon to rush equipment from Asia and Europe commands.

update_log.text: Trump cancels Pakistan-hosted Iran peace talks citing poor proposal from Tehran
US enforces ironclad blockade on Iran with 34+ ships intercepted globally
Israel launches fresh strikes in Lebanon's Khiam amid ceasefire extension
Russia fires 619 drones at Ukraine killing 10 civilians
Trump safe after shooting incident at White House correspondents dinner
